message:
feat(sql): add MEDIAN and PERCENTILE aggregate functions

- Add MEDIAN aggregate for 50th percentile
- Add PERCENTILE/QUANTILE/PERCENTILE_CONT for arbitrary percentiles
- Add PercentileAccumulator with value storage and sorting
- Use linear interpolation for percentile calculation
- Add tests for MEDIAN and PERCENTILE (0, 0.25, 0.5, 0.75, 1.0)
- Mark Phase 5 (Aggregations) complete in FEATURE_COMPARISON.md
